Project: TradeTrust

TradeTrust is a production-grade B2B Trade Credit Intelligence Platform for textile wholesalers, saree manufacturers, silk traders, fabric distributors and MSMEs.

Tech Stack:

* Next.js 15
* TypeScript
* TailwindCSS
* shadcn/ui
* Supabase PostgreSQL

Design System:

* Enterprise SaaS
* Dark Fintech Theme
* Background #0B1020
* Card #161F35
* Border #25304D
* Accent Gold #C9A227

Rules:

* TypeScript only
* Mobile responsive
* Production-ready code
* Reusable components
* Server Actions preferred
* No mock data
* No placeholder lorem ipsum
* Feature-based architecture

Core Modules:

* Authentication
* Company Search
* Company Profiles
* Claims
* Documents
* Disputes
* Credit Scores
* Admin Dashboard
